stemHtml: How does the GBAS precision approach work?

options.a: A GBAS ground station sends correction data to the aircraft, which uses the data to determine the correct azimuth and glidepath.
options.b: A GBAS ground station sends correction signals to a ground transmitter, which sends azimuth and glidepath information to the aircraft.
options.c: A GBAS satellite sends azimuth and glidepath information to the aircraft.
options.d: A GBAS station sends approach path information directly to the aircraft.
